inputs.description: Implement Task 7 from the plan: Create tests/app/test_scholar_evidence.py with the 20 historian evaluation queries. Create reports/scholar-pipeline/ directory. Each test captures full pipeline trace (interpreter plan, executor result, narrator response, latency) and saves to reports/scholar-pipeline/<run-id>/. Include summary.md generation. Mark with @pytest.mark.integration (requires OPENAI_API_KEY). If OPENAI_API_KEY is available, run the evidence tests and save results. If not, just create the test file and verify it's syntactically valid.
